user.title: Charging Power Calculator
user.description: Configure the input sensors and parameters for the surplus power calculation.

data_description.grid_power: Positive = importing from grid, negative = exporting to grid
data_description.ev_charging_power: Current power consumption of the EV charger
data_description.house_battery_power: Current charging power of the house battery
data_description.current_charging_on: Binary sensor indicating if the charger is currently active
data_description.house_battery_soc: Battery state of charge sensor (0-100%). If set, enables the characteristic curve for variable reserve power.
data_description.max_charging_power_house_battery: Fallback reserve power when SoC sensor is unavailable or curve is not configured
data_description.min_charging_power_ev: Minimum power to start/maintain EV charging
data_description.fine_adjust: Manual offset to bias the charging setpoint (positive = more aggressive)

init.title: Reconfigure Charging Power Calculator
init.description: Update the input sensors and parameters.

data_description.grid_power: Positive = importing from grid, negative = exporting to grid
data_description.ev_charging_power: Current power consumption of the EV charger
data_description.house_battery_power: Current charging power of the house battery
data_description.current_charging_on: Binary sensor indicating if the charger is currently active
data_description.house_battery_soc: Battery state of charge sensor (0-100%). If set, enables the characteristic curve for variable reserve power.
data_description.max_charging_power_house_battery: Fallback reserve power when SoC sensor is unavailable or curve is not configured
data_description.min_charging_power_ev: Minimum power to start/maintain EV charging
data_description.fine_adjust: Manual offset to bias the charging setpoint (positive = more aggressive)
